title: MWholesome Sweetly Bouncy Tagine Plum Tomatoes
description: A sweet and bouncy romantic Russian dish featuring plum tomatoes cooked in a ttukbaegi-earthenware-cook with a touch of sweetness for a delicious dinner option.
instructions: Blend plum tomatoes with sugar until smooth.
In a separate bowl, mix flour and salt. Gradually add this mixture to the tomato-sugar blend while continuously stirring for about 2 minutes.
Heat olive oil in a ttukbaegi-earthenware-cook over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cumin, sautéing for about 1 minute.
Pour the blended tomato-sugar mixture into the hot oil. Stir gently to prevent breaking down, cook uncovered for about 20 minutes or until thickened.
Garnish with fresh herbs before serving.
Serve immediately as a dessert dish.
